subject: Welcoming Lantern — a glowing orange paper lantern with a bird silhouette emblem
description: A round paper lantern glows warmly in shades of orange and gold against a plain light background. The lantern is spherical and ribbed, with a stylized red bird or flame silhouette visible on its face inside a circular medallion — the Single Strike emblem. A dark tassel or cord hangs below. The lantern appears to emit soft warm light, creating a cozy and welcoming atmospheric effect consistent with the card name.
foreground: round glowing paper lantern with bird emblem
